## Summary

Describe the change and the eMAS phase or component affected.

## Change type

- [ ] Requirements or documentation
- [ ] PowerShell scripts or shared engine
- [ ] Mapping workbook or VBA
- [ ] Runtime JSON or schema
- [ ] Report template
- [ ] WPF interface
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Build or release

## Traceability

- Requirement IDs:
- Rule IDs:
- Test IDs:
- Configuration version:
- Template version:

## Verification

- [ ] Change respects the one-runtime-JSON architecture.
- [ ] PowerShell does not read the mapping workbook or create JSON.
- [ ] Source data remains read-only.
- [ ] Relevant tests were added or updated.
- [ ] No customer data, credentials, production logs or project evidence are included.
- [ ] Documentation and diagrams were updated where required.
- [ ] Binary workbook changes include reviewable VBA/source information where applicable.

## Evidence

List commands executed, test results, generated sample evidence and known limitations.
